desc.SICILIANA: Tomato, mozzarella, anchovies, capers and olives.
desc.CALABRESE: Tomato, mozzarella and spicy Calabrian sausage.
desc.VEGETARIANA: Tomato, mozzarella, red pepper, courgette and aubergine.
desc.4 STAGIONI: Tomato, mozzarella, mushrooms, cooked ham, artichokes and spicy sausage.
desc.ITALIANA: Tomato, buffalo mozzarella, cherry tomatoes and basil.
desc.CIOCIARA: Mozzarella, Friarielli sausage and cherry tomatoes.
desc.FANTASÍA: Tomato, mozzarella, and 4 toppings of your choice.
desc.BOSCAIOLA: Tomato, mozzarella, sausage, mushrooms and black pepper.
desc.SPECK: Tomato, mozzarella, smoked ham and mushrooms.
desc.TROPEA: Mozzarella, red onion, fresh tomato and basil.
desc.HAWAI: Tomato, mozzarella, pineapple, sweetcorn and ham.
desc.BRESAOLINA: Tomato, mozzarella, bresaola, rocket and Grana Padano cheese.
desc.4 FORMAGGI: Tomato, mozzarella, gorgonzola, fontina, Emmental and goat cheese.
desc.FOCACCIA CRUDO: Oil, rosemary, salt and cured ham.
desc.FOCACCIA CAPRESE: Oil, fresh tomato, fresh mozzarella and basil.
desc.LA FOCACCIA DELLO ZIO: Mozzarella bocconcini, spicy salami, spicy sobrasada, fresh tomato, oil, oregano and chilli.
desc.SALENTINA: Mozzarella, burrata, sun-dried tomatoes and rocket.
desc.BIG CALZONE: Tomato, mozzarella, ham, egg and vegetables.
desc.RUSTICELLA (Calzone): Tomato, mozzarella, cooked ham, cheese and vegetables.
desc.NORVEGIA: Mozzarella, burrata, smoked salmon and rocket.

faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Here you'll find answers to the most common questions about our restaurant.
faq.q1: Do I need to book a table?
faq.a1: We recommend booking, especially on weekends. You can book online for Arrabassada, and for Tarragona by calling +34 687 605 647.
faq.a2: Yes, you can order delivery by calling our restaurants or through JustEat. Soon you'll also be able to order from this website, with exclusive discounts!
faq.q3: Do you have options for allergies or intolerances?
faq.a3: Yes, all our dishes have allergens listed on the menu. Please check them before placing your order.
faq.a4: Yes, we accept credit/debit card and cash at all our locations.
faq.q5: What are the restaurant opening hours?
faq.a5: Tarragona: Wed–Mon 19:00–23:30. Arrabassada: Tue–Sun 19:00–23:30. El Rincón de Lo Zio: Mon–Sat 8:00–22:00. Check the locations section for more details.
faq.q6: Can I book for large groups?
faq.a6: For groups of more than 15, please call us directly: Tarragona at +34 687 605 647 or Arrabassada at +34 682 239 035, and we'll arrange your booking.
faq.a7: Absolutely! All our dough is made fresh daily with quality ingredients following the traditional Italian recipe.
faq.a8: We have three locations: Lo Zio Tarragona at Carrer Reding 32, Lo Zio Arrabassada at Carrer Joan Fuster 28, and El Rincón de Lo Zio at Carrer dels Castellers 1. Check the locations section for more info.
faq.q9: Why choose Lo Zio among all the pizzerias in Tarragona?
faq.a9: Our customers say it best: Lo Zio was voted Best Restaurant in Catalonia at the JustEat Awards 2025, chosen by thousands of people who order delivery every day. This isn't a critics' award or a food guide, it's a direct vote from real people ordering pizza on a Friday night. That's what makes us most proud. You can see all the winners at the JustEat Awards 2025.
faq.q10: Which pizzas can pregnant women eat?
faq.a10: Although most of our pizzas are baked at high temperatures — which eliminates the usual risks — it is advisable to avoid any pizza with meat. Best avoided: Catalana (semi-raw egg), Bresaolina (cold bresaola), 4 Formaggi (gorgonzola), Norvegia (cold smoked salmon), Salentina (fresh burrata), Focaccia Crudo (raw ham) and La Focaccia dello Zio (raw sobrasada). Always consult your doctor.
